items.name: Excel for Financial Modelling
items.tagline: Master Excel to build Financial Models
items.description: Practitioner-built Udemy course on financial modelling in Excel. Built by Samir Asadov — CFA, top-rated modeler (FMWC & CFI), with M&A and structured finance experience in renewable energy. Covers: three-statement model integration, DCF valuation, LBO modelling, and scenario analysis — all built from scratch in Excel with real-world deal logic. For: finance students, analysts, CFA candidates, and anyone who wants to model like a practitioner.

items.name: ReddLeads
items.tagline: Find high-intent clients on Reddit — on autopilot.
items.description: Most Reddit lead tools match keywords. We match intent. ReddLeads uses AI to understand WHY someone posted — not just what words they used. So instead of 500 noisy alerts, you get 9 high-intent leads worth your time. New: built-in lead CRM, instant Discord/Telegram/Slack alerts, AI-drafted warm openers, and 0% Reddit ban risk — we never auto-post or auto-DM.

items.name: CapQuill
items.tagline: Native Mac capture & annotation app. Pay once, use forever.
items.description: CapQuill is a native macOS screenshot and screen recording app built with Swift ✓ 6 capture modes: region, fullscreen, window, delayed, screen recording, audio recording ✓ 20 professional annotation tools with non-destructive editing ✓ OCR text recognition in English, Korean, Japanese & Chinese ✓ Built-in capture library with tags and search ✓ Export to PNG, JPEG, TIFF, PDF Lightning-fast startup and a beautifully native UI. One-time $5. No subscription. 7-day free trial included.

items.name: PasteMyText — Instant Text Analyzer
items.description: Paste any text to instantly check word count, reading time, readability score, and tone. Free, no signup required.

items.name: PostShot
items.tagline: Turn any social media post into an animated video clip
items.description: Paste a link from X, Reddit, Instagram, or LinkedIn and get an animated video clip ready for your editor. No more ugly tweet screenshots in your videos. ✨ Multiple animation styles & themes 🎨 Custom branding & transparent backgrounds 📐 Export in 16:9, 9:16, or 1:1 Free (3 exports/month) · Pro $3.99/mo unlimited No credit card needed. Just paste and go.

items.name: WowTok
items.tagline: From prompt to viral TikTok in minutes
items.description: Create stunning TikTok videos with AI. Choose a theme, write your prompt, and let AI generate a complete video with voiceover in minutes.

items.name: lumeforms
items.tagline: the indie alternative to corporate feedback tools
items.description: ai-native feedback tool & form software: lumeforms uses a multi-pass analysis flow to transform honest text responses into clear themes & actionable intelligence tailored to your context. No more manually sifting through responses. Delegate it to lumeforms.

items.name: BotGig
items.description: BotGig is a marketplace for buying and delivering AI-powered services with transparent workflows, verification, and structured execution.

items.name: Buy High Sell Low
items.tagline: AI-powered stock summaries & paper trading for investing
items.description: Free AI-powered insights & paper trading. Includes delayed S&P 500, ETF, & Crypto prices, news analysis, and 'What If' calculator.

items.name: Listen To This
items.tagline: Paste an article to listen to it in your podcast app
items.description: Paste any article URL and it shows up in your preferred podcast app, ready to listen. You can also add pdfs, and or copy paste the text directly. As you send articles to your podcast feed, you can choose to translate, summarize and/or reframe each articles with different styles (e.g. "Explain like I'm five") Finally, If you don't have an article you want, you can also choose topics you care about and we'll deliver one great article each day to your podcast feed.
